title: speak: dynamic safety timer based on text length and markers
desc: Safety timer arms on first KaraokeTick when playback starts, not on window load. Duration = max(60s, lastMarker.AudioPos+30s, charCount*0.4s+30s)
steps: Old: hardcoded 30s from Loaded event (races with synth.Speak + player.Load)
New: _safetyTimerArmed flag, armed in KaraokeTick when _stopwatch.IsRunning
Duration computed from last marker AudioPos + 30s buffer (min 60s)
Fixes: 250-300 char Korean text timing out before playback completes

requirements.expect: does not timeout before playback ends
safety timer starts only after player.PlaySync begins not on window load

requirements.prompt: speak safety timer dynamic: KaraokeTick-based, text-length duration. Commit 967ccc72.

author: claude
